name: Multi-species synbiotic DS-01
summary: Synbiotic capsule combining 24 probiotic strains with pomegranate polyphenol substrate to increase endogenous urolithin A and butyrate production.
mechanism_summary: Uses live strains plus a polyphenol substrate to increase microbial conversion capacity for urolithin A and to raise fecal butyrate in low-baseline producers; this is target-engagement evidence with major overlap across microbiome tracks.

open_questions: Whether metabolite increases persist after discontinuation
Whether urolithin A or butyrate increases translate to functional or clinical benefit
How much of the signal belongs to metabolite restoration versus live-biotherapeutic or composition modulation
